context_text: <A> and um like around four o'clock my boss called and said you know do you want you workers to go home and i'm like why / <B> mhm / <A> you know what we got a full day here we stay there up until seven i'm well my workers are staying till seven why would they go home early / <B> mhm / <A> he said oh well you guys don't have your tv on and i'm like no we're moving why would i have my tv { on and } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> i'm in the middle of boxes here i'm not going to sit { down and } / <B> [ right ] / <A> watch tv he goes oh well you know you know the world trade center that's how i actually found out you know { like my } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> boss told me and i'm like oh wow / <B> really / <A> he's like well we're letting people off early if they if they're affected by this and i'm like well i don't think anyone's affected but i'll ask and none of my workers had any like i have like over four hundred workers / <B> right / <A> and out of four hundred workers not a single one of them { knew about it } / <B> [ wow ]
